h1_verdicts.detail: Cover 'mobius_2set': 2 patches, 1 overlaps, 0 triples. Transition 1-cochain g is a valid cocycle: True. [g] trivial in H1 (global section exists via coefficient-aware encoding): True. Loop sign product (informal monodromy): -1. Blind scalar encoding reports a section: True (false section: False).

Cover 'mobius_annular_4': 4 patches, 4 overlaps, 0 triples. Transition 1-cochain g is a valid cocycle: True. [g] trivial in H1 (global section exists via coefficient-aware encoding): False. Loop sign product (informal monodromy): -1. Blind scalar encoding reports a section: True (false section: True).

Cover 'cylinder_annular_4': 4 patches, 4 overlaps, 0 triples. Transition 1-cochain g is a valid cocycle: True. [g] trivial in H1 (global section exists via coefficient-aware encoding): True. Loop sign product (informal monodromy): +1. Blind scalar encoding reports a section: True (false section: False).

ac_comparisons.detail: Cover 'mobius_annular_4': AC5 transition retained = True. PO1 AC6 (restricted system globally obstructed) = True. AC7 (each patch locally orientable / source satisfiable) = True. Coefficient-aware H1 reports obstruction = True. H1 verdict agrees with PO1 AC6 = True. Carrying AC5 (the transition cochain) reproduces the PO1 restricted-obstruction verdict.

Cover 'mobius_annular_4': AC5 transition retained = False. PO1 AC6 (restricted system globally obstructed) = True. AC7 (each patch locally orientable / source satisfiable) = True. Coefficient-aware H1 reports obstruction = False. H1 verdict agrees with PO1 AC6 = False. Forgetting AC5 (coefficient-blind) makes H1 trivial while PO1's ground-truth AC6 still flags obstruction -> the T222 false-section trap, localized to AC5-forgetting.

Cover 'cylinder_annular_4': AC5 transition retained = True. PO1 AC6 (restricted system globally obstructed) = False. AC7 (each patch locally orientable / source satisfiable) = True. Coefficient-aware H1 reports obstruction = False. H1 verdict agrees with PO1 AC6 = True. Carrying AC5 (the transition cochain) reproduces the PO1 restricted-obstruction verdict.

summary: Coefficient-aware Cech-H1 over a finite annular nerve, valued in Z2, carrying the orientation transition 1-cochain. On the Mobius witness it reports a NONTRIVIAL class (no global section, loop sign -1) exactly where the T222 coefficient-blind scalar encoding falsely reported a section; on the cylinder both report a section. The transition cochain IS PO1's AC5 'named forgotten structure': retaining it reproduces PO1's AC6 restricted-obstruction verdict, forgetting it (blind encoding) collapses the class to trivial and loses the obstruction -- the T222 false-section trap localized to AC5-forgetting. FINITE WITNESS ONLY: no general continuum sheaf-cohomology theorem is claimed; this exhibits the coefficient-aware-vs-blind distinction on finite covers.
